action: Authenticate and version-bind the Unicode data bundle used by identifier admission gates.
finding: IdentifierStatus.txt, confusables.txt, and DerivedCoreProperties.txt must enter the admission pipeline as one exact-version, digest-verified bundle with redirect rejection and matching version headers.
verification: Five deterministic Node tests passed locally: exact bundle accepted; mutable alias, digest mismatch, cross-version data, and response URL change rejected.
handoff: Connect the authenticated bundle output to the R-031 Identifier_Status evaluator and R-032 confusable-skeleton evaluator, then run exhaustive full-data idempotency and reference-conformance tests.
hard_boundaries_preserved: No GitHub files or history deleted.
Authentication of source bytes is not represented as proof of identifier safety.
